data.title: Vercel: Build and deploy the best web experiences with the AI Cloud

data.ogTitle: Vercel: Build and deploy the best web experiences with the AI Cloud – Vercel
data.ogDescription: Vercel gives developers the frameworks, workflows, and infrastructure to build a faster, more personalized web.

issues.impact: Google will cut off your title in search results. You're losing valuable click-through real estate.
issues.fix: Trim to under 60 characters. Front-load your most important keywords.

issues.impact: You're leaving valuable persuasion space unused.
issues.fix: Expand to 150-160 characters. Sell the click!

issues.impact: Multiple H1s confuse search engines about your page's main topic.
issues.fix: Use only one H1 per page. Use H2-H6 for subheadings.

issues.impact: Slow load times = higher bounce rates. Mobile users are leaving before your page loads.
issues.fix: Compress images, minify CSS/JS, enable gzip compression. Target under 500KB.

issues.impact: Missing out on rich snippets (star ratings, prices, availability) in search results.
issues.fix: Add schema.org JSON-LD markup for products, reviews, FAQs, or local business

summary: We analyzed vercel.com and found 5 issues affecting your search visibility and conversions. The biggest opportunities are fixing your meta tags, improving mobile optimization, and adding structured data for rich snippets. These changes could significantly increase your organic traffic within 30-60 days.

fixes.title: Title too long (67 chars)
fixes.reason: Google will cut off your title in search results. You're losing valuable click-through real estate.

fixes.title: Meta description too short (111 chars)
fixes.reason: You're leaving valuable persuasion space unused.

fixes.title: Multiple H1 tags (2 found)
fixes.reason: Multiple H1s confuse search engines about your page's main topic.

fixes.title: Large page size (932 KB)
fixes.reason: Slow load times = higher bounce rates. Mobile users are leaving before your page loads.

fixes.title: No structured data found
fixes.reason: Missing out on rich snippets (star ratings, prices, availability) in search results.
